headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Slip As Strong Jobs Data Meets Rate Pressure
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Friday, Apr, 3 2026 US stock futures are slightly softer this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts modestly in the red, as investors weigh strong US job signals against rising borrowing costs and pricier food and energy. Weekly initial jobless claims sit at 202,000, near a 2 year low, which indicates companies are still holding on to workers and supports expectations for a March payroll gain of about 60,000 jobs and wage growth of 0.3% month on...
